_note_1: Default is a global-only baseline. Set model.use_local_surrogate=true and provide a local checkpoint after Stage A is trained.
_note_2: 0005 tests latest update for port/global temperature consistency

model._note_geometry_and_capacity: Geometry auto-values are read from the processed dataset. Keep num_hyperedges near the expected number of module/plume groups, not necessarily equal to env token count.
model._note_local_surrogate: Stage B uses the frozen Stage-A surrogate for module internal/interface response. Use corrected_physics so q_normal remains anchored to predicted T_env and h_effective.
model._note_regularization_and_bottleneck: dropout is low because datasets are small and physics targets already regularize. organizer_bottleneck_gate_init controls how much the field decoder initially relies on hyperedge state; 0.7 gives the organizer responsibility without removing direct geometry context.
model._note_thermal_prior_scales: These only affect fallback/legacy organizer priors and diagnostics. Distance/downstream/lateral scales are in physical channel units; keep them comparable to module spacing and plume width.

loss._note_main_prediction_losses: Field remains the primary objective. Internal/interface losses train the local-surrogate coupling path once predicted ports are used; interface q_normal is intentionally weaker than T_surface.
loss._note_local_surrogate_interface_target_w: T_surface remains primary. q_normal is weakly supervised because flux is computed from predicted T_env, h_effective, and T_surface.
loss._note_port_supervision: Keep port supervision active from epoch 0 because predicted-mode quality depends on T_env and h_effective. port_supervised_weight replaces port_condition_weight; the old key is retained for backward compatibility.
loss._note_predicted_consistency: This gently practices the autonomous path before fully predicted mode by feeding predicted ports through the frozen local surrogate. Keep it smaller than field/interface weights and ramp with warmup.
loss._note_port_h_scale: Deprecated: h_effective is trained in log1p space with interface_condition_valid_mask, so port_h_scale is ignored.
loss._note_organizer_strength_weight: Organizer strength is logged as diag_organizer_strength_mean only. Positive organizer_strength_weight used to penalize strong hyperedges and should usually stay 0.0.
loss._note_organizer_direct: Structure losses use training-only preprocessing targets. Legacy prior/factor/mass terms are kept available but off by default.
loss._note_organizer_core_weights: These weights are conservative so organizer supervision shapes the bottleneck without dominating field/interface prediction. Increase env_module first if env tokens still collapse; increase duplicate only if hyperedge columns become nearly identical.
loss._note_active_edge_logic: Active-edge regularization matches the estimated number of physical thermal regions. It is not a uniform-all-edges rule, so one-module or one-plume cases can legitimately use few hyperedges.
loss._note_legacy_organizer_terms: These older prior/factor/mass losses remain available for ablations or old datasets, but default to 0 because direct structure targets are preferred.
loss._note_legacy_prior_scales: Used only by organizer_me / eh_factor fallback terms and by old-HDF5 geometry fallbacks. Keep aligned with model thermal_prior_* unless deliberately testing a different prior.

training._note_optimizer: Long epoch count assumes manual early stopping/checkpoint selection from validation curves. Use max_train_batches_per_epoch for smoke tests.
training._note_port_curriculum: Start teacher-forced for stability, transition through mixed ports, then train/evaluate predicted ports. predicted_after_epoch marks when the autonomous path is fully active.
training._note_organizer_schedule: Organizer losses are strongest while hyperedges form, then decay so final field/interface accuracy can refine without overfitting the heuristic structure targets.
training._note_debug_limits: Set these to small integers for dry runs. Leave null for full training.

stage_c_future._note: For later joint fine-tuning, set freeze_local_surrogate=false after Stage B is stable and lower the learning rate.
